message:
feat(fcp-telemetry): add symbol coverage and diversity metrics

Adds comprehensive metrics for monitoring object symbol distribution across
the storage mesh, enabling operators to detect coverage degradation and
diversity policy violations.

New metrics:
- fcp_symbol_coverage_distinct_nodes: Gauge tracking number of nodes
  holding symbols for an object (diversity indicator)
- fcp_symbol_coverage_bps: Gauge for coverage ratio in basis points
  (10000 = 100% coverage)
- fcp_symbol_max_node_fraction_bps: Gauge for maximum symbol fraction
  held by any single node (concentration risk indicator)
- fcp_symbol_diversity_violations_total: Counter for denied reconstructions
  due to insufficient source diversity
- fcp_symbol_coverage_evaluations_total: Counter for total evaluations

Helper functions:
- record_symbol_coverage(zone_id, distinct_nodes, coverage_bps, max_fraction)
  Records all coverage gauges and increments evaluation counter
- record_diversity_violation(zone_id, required, actual)
  Increments violation counter with required/actual labels

All metrics are labeled by zone_id for per-zone monitoring. Violations
include required and actual diversity counts for debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
